stem: A scatterplot shows the size x (in hundreds of square feet) and the sale price y (in thousands of dollars) of 22 condominiums in City T. The trend rises from approximately (5, 175) to (30, 525). Which of the following could be an equation for a line of best fit for the data?
rationale: Slope ≈ (525 − 175)/(30 − 5) = 350/25 = 14 thousand dollars per hundred square feet. y-intercept ≈ 175 − 14(5) = 105, roughly between answer choices; the equation y = 140 + 14x predicts y ≈ 210 at x = 5 and y ≈ 560 at x = 30, which is close to the data. Choice (a) is correct.
